name: Chocolate Pools
recipeIngredient: 2 packages sweet chocolate bars, 4 oz. each
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the chocolate in a medium bowl on high for 2 to 3 minutes, or until almost melted, stirring halfway through the heating time.
2. Stir the chocolate until it is completely melted.
3. Spoon a scant tablespoon of chocolate onto a waxed paper-lined cookie sheet or tray.
4. Spread each pool with a spatula to form a 2-inch circle.
5. Immediately sprinkle with garnishes.
6. Refrigerate for 30 minutes, or until the chocolate is firm.
7. Store leftover Chocolate Pools in the refrigerator. Makes 15.
8. Nutty Pools: Prepare Chocolate Pools as directed. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup nuts, such as toasted silvered almonds, peanuts, or toasted chopped pecans or walnuts.
9. Father's Day Pools: Prepare Chocolate Pools as directed. Sprinkle with 1 cup broken salted pretzel rods. Drizzle with 2 squares melted white baking chocolate, if desired.
10. Rocky Road Pools: Prepare Chocolate Pool as directed. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup miniature marshmallows and 1/3 cup peanuts.
11. Drizzling Tip: Place 1 square of chocolate in a heavy-duty zipper-style plastic bag. Close tightly. Microwave on high for 30 seconds. Add 30 seconds for each additional chocolate square. Squeeze the bag gently to completely melt it. Roll up the bag to push the chocolate into the corner. Cut off a tiny piece of the corner (1/8 inch). Gently squeeze the bag to drizzle the chocolate.
